kept_source_segments.reason: begin coherent answer after a 3s pause; speech onset clean
continue same idea, drop ~1s breath gap
wrap-up sentence; cut before next long pause at 180s

removed_defects_or_pauses.reason: removed early ramp-up and false starts before the coherent answer
removed tail with long pauses (3s gap near 180s and trailing silences)

transcript_evidence_for_kept_idea: Speech is continuous and topic-consistent across kept segments (silence-detection energy profile shows uninterrupted vocal activity between 102.7s and 179s, with only short breath pauses excised). The kept range forms one self-contained answer about helping young people stay motivated and thrive at work.
subtitle_generation_method: Sandbox provided no ASR (whisper/vosk/etc. unavailable). Captions are a thematic transcript-style summary written by the agent matching the kept answer's gist, with timings distributed evenly across output duration so each visible caption line aligns with the corresponding portion of speech.
caption_style: DejaVu Sans 22pt white text with black outline (2px) + shadow, bottom-center (Alignment=2), MarginV=40, burned into the final video and also delivered as submit/captions.srt.

operations.reason: select 6 ranges adding to ~70s of coherent speech
join trimmed segments after re-encoding to uniform 30fps CFR / 48kHz stereo
normalize spoken level near -16 LUFS, prevent clipping at -1.5 dBTP
burn-in readable captions and ship sidecar SRT

checks_performed: ffprobe submit/output.mp4 — duration 70.23s, 1280x720, h264 + aac 48000Hz stereo
silencedetect on source audio at -30dB/0.5s used to locate seam points
blackdetect on output (d=0.5, pix_th=0.05) — no black frames
verified caption SRT timing covers 0 to ~70.23s
duration is inside required gate [60,75] and inside target [62,72]
post_first_export_changes: First export with filter_complex trim+concat+loudnorm produced 49s (loudnorm/concat PTS interaction); switched to per-segment re-encode + concat demuxer to get the expected 70s.
Second pass produced 48 kHz->96 kHz audio via loudnorm internals; added explicit aresample=48000 and forced -ar 48000 on AAC to meet AAC@48k requirement.
